hooks.command: if [ -d .crabcc ]; then crabcc index --refresh >/dev/null 2>&1; else echo 'crabcc: no index in this repo (run /crabcc-init)'; fi

echo "$CLAUDE_HOOK_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rg [A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]+|grep -[a-zA-Z]* [A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]+|find [^|]* -name' && echo 'hint: try `crabcc sym/refs/callers` — symbol-aware and ~10× cheaper on tokens' >&2; exit 0
